neighbors.name: Steven J. Brennan & Francesca Brennan
neighbors.claims: Steven J. Brennan is a licensed real estate broker and attorney based in Tucson, Arizona ([Martindale](https://www.martindale.com/attorney/steven-brennan-410873/)). He has a background in law enforcement and is associated with Cambridge Investment Research ([BrokerCheck](https://brokercheck.finra.org/individual/summary/2739189)). Francesca Brennan is the owner of La Mariposa Resort in Tucson ([BBB](https://www.bbb.org/us/az/tucson/profile/health-club/la-mariposa-resort-1286-1305)). The Brennans are non-resident landowners in Cochise County, with their primary professional and residential ties located in Pima County ([Zillow](https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/1632-N-Mariposa-Woods-Pl-309-Tucson-AZ-85749/455799539_zpid/)).
neighbors.influence_justification: Non-resident owners; primary influence is in Pima County

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach via formal communication. Given Steven's legal and real estate background, ensure all project documentation is precise and emphasizes property value protection.

neighbors.name: Lodestar Investments L.C.
neighbors.claims: Lodestar Investments L.C. is a corporate landowner with an address listed on Highway 83 in Sonoita, Arizona ([Labyrinth Locator](https://labyrinthlocator.org/labyrinth/boulder-crest-foundation-2/187/)). The entity appears linked to the Lodestar Gardens Learning Center, which operates in the Sonoita area ([Lodestar Gardens](http://lodestargardens.com/?page_id=2)). Commercial land listings on Highway 83 in Sonoita indicate activity in the area, though specific ownership by Lodestar Investments L.C. is not explicitly detailed in public web listings ([LoopNet](https://www.loopnet.com/Listing/3123-Highway-83-Sonoita-AZ/28519036/)).
neighbors.influence_justification: Corporate entity with unclear local operational footprint

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage via business channels. Clarify if the entity is related to Lodestar Gardens (agricultural/educational) or a separate investment vehicle.

Exact corporate structure could not be fully disambiguated from web sources.

neighbors.name: Patsy J. Moriarty
neighbors.claims: Patsy J. Moriarty is an individual landowner in Cochise County with no evident public profile or documented participation in local development meetings ([Cochise County Agenda Center](https://www.cochise.az.gov/AgendaCenter)). No records of letters to the editor or social media activity regarding renewable energy were found for a person of this name in the county ([Cochise County](https://www.cochise.az.gov/)).
neighbors.influence_justification: Private citizen; no public role found

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out through a personal, respectful conversation to understand any concerns, as she has not voiced any public stance.

neighbors.name: Adam Chabal
neighbors.claims: Adam Chabal is a landowner with no identified public presence in Cochise County media or government records ([Cochise County Agenda Center](https://www.cochise.az.gov/AgendaCenter)). An individual named Adam Chabal is associated with the Regis High School Class of 2004 and resides in South Jersey as of 2024, suggesting potential absentee ownership, though this link is not definitively confirmed for the Cochise County parcel ([Regis Magazine](https://www.regis.org/communications/documents/Regis%20Magazine%20-%20Fall%202024.pdf)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage quietly one-on-one to introduce the project. Assume absentee status and provide comprehensive information packages.
